name: CLX - MGA Insurance Zoho Sign Callback v1

nodes.name: Webhook
nodes.notes: DEACTIVATED. Public POST. Zoho Sign webhook. Validates HMAC signature using ZOHO_SIGN_WEBHOOK_SECRET. On request_completed: marks compliance_disclosures.acknowledged_at + acknowledgment_method='esignature' (vertical_id='insurance'), downloads signed PDF, uploads to R2 at /signed-disclosures/insurance/{client_id}/{envelope_id}.pdf. On request_declined: notifies advisor + logs reason. Audit logged regardless.

nodes.name: Upload Signed PDF to R2
nodes.notes: Signed PDFs are private (acl=private). Compliance officer dashboard generates pre-signed URLs on demand for review (Phase 5b). PDFs are the regulator-facing record — never publicly listable.

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ acknowledged_at: new Date().toISOString(), acknowledgment_method: 'esignature', signed_document_url: ($env.R2_PUBLIC_URL || 'https://videos.crystallux.org') + '/signed-disclosures/insurance/' + $('Decide Path').item.json.client_id + '/' + $('Decide Path').item.json.envelope_id + '.pdf' }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ internal_secret: $env.INTERNAL_EMAIL_SECRET, template: 'lead-meeting-booked', to: 'compliance@crystallux.org', vars: { first_name: 'Compliance Team', message: 'INSURANCE disclosure DECLINED. Disclosure type=' + $json.disclosure_type + ' envelope=' + $json.envelope_id + '. Reason: ' + ($json.decline_reason || '(none provided)'), landing_url: 'https://app.crystallux.org/compliance' } }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ vertical_id: 'insurance', event_type: $('Decide Path').item.json.kind === 'signed' ? 'disclosure_signed' : ($('Decide Path').item.json.kind === 'declined' ? 'disclosure_declined' : 'disclosure_other'), client_id: $('Decide Path').item.json.client_id, performed_by_user_id: null, performed_by_role: 'agent', event_data: { disclosure_id: $('Decide Path').item.json.disclosure_id, envelope_id: $('Decide Path').item.json.envelope_id, disclosure_type: $('Decide Path').item.json.disclosure_type, decline_reason: $('Decide Path').item.json.decline_reason }, occurred_at: new Date().toISOString() }) }}

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ ok: true, vertical_id: 'insurance', kind: $('Decide Path').item.json.kind }) }}
